name: Detection of Turla Filename IOC in Events
notes:
This rule triggers when an IOC is recognized as a Turla related filename.

Note: The rules Malware as a Service Hash IOC in Events, Ransomware: Ryuk IOC in Events have been excluded from this rule to avoid repetition, their purpose is to have a dedicated rule response.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
when an event matches any of the following Malware as a Service Hash IOC in Events, Ransomware: Ryuk IOC in Events

when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Successful File Modification, System.File Deleted, System.File Created, Audit.Object Load Success, System.Process Creation Success, System.Information, Access.Permission Change Success, Audit.Object Access Success, Audit.Object Access Failure
when the event matches "Filename" is not null AQL filter query
when the event matches REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Known Turla Filenames', "Filename") AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Detection of Turla Filename IOC in Events on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
AND NOT when an event matches any of the following Malware as a Service Hash IOC in Events, Ransomware: Ryuk IOC in Events

AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Successful File Modification, System.File Deleted, System.File Created, Audit.Object Load Success, System.Process Creation Success, System.Information, Access.Permission Change Success, Audit.Object Access Success, Audit.Object Access Failure
AND when the event matches "Filename" is not null AQL filter query
AND when the event matches REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Known Turla Filenames', "Filename") AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Detection of Turla Filename IOC in Events
Event description: Detects when an IOC is recognized as a Turla related filename.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Machine Identifier (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
